pages.text: Beautifully pale and full of mysteries. $(thing)Beaming amber$() helps stabilizing $(thing)gold$() and $(thing)silver$() in a $(l:innovation/burn/kiln)kiln$().

pages.title: Aetherial Electrum Ingot
pages.text: Unlike mundane silver and gold alloys, this material seems to hold fascinating purifying properties that allow it to power the $(l:innovation/utilities/aether_machines)aetherium capacitor$() and channel the power of other materials.
